3109460.name: Sudden Soul
3109460.description:
No prophecies. No legends foretold. No destined hero.


A sudden blackout within the city of Oasys causes havoc as people and creatures wake up with new powers. Control 10 different party members each with their own element which can combo off another. Light up an enemy who just got oil bombed, electrocute a ruffian after they got drenched in water - and many more possibilities.

  • Sudden Soul is a turn-based RPG with CCG (Collectible Card Game) elements.
  • Each party member specializes in a different elemental power that can combo off another.
  • 3D platforming overworld.
  • Mini games.
  • Sock stealing slugs that vehemently believe they're snails.



Gameplay and screenshots shown are all A WORK IN PROGRESS.
3109460.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
